description: Goal: once function publication is raw, direct source and Fz.Compiler.define become the same definition-publication operation. Signal: identical raw definition fragments publish identical FunctionSource, module, and namespace facts regardless of entry path; apply_compiler_define becomes boundary validation plus delegation; regressions prove fact equivalence across entry paths. Strategy: salvage the good part of the current local refactor — the equivalence contract and shared fragment transaction — but rebuild it on top of raw publication instead of eager function expansion.
title: Compiler2 definition publication: unify direct and Fz.Compiler.define on raw source facts
